pages.title: Three in the End
pages.text: $(item)Palladium$() — pale violet, spawns on outer end islands.$(br)$(item)Aurorium$() — golden, the most aesthetically striking End ore.$(br)$(item)Abyssum$() — deep purple-black, rare.

pages.title: Uru Meteors (SoA-specific)
pages.text: The End also hosts $(item)Uru$() meteors — floating obsidiorite cubes with uru_ore cores. Registered under the $(o)soa_additions$() namespace, not $(o)taiga$().$(br2)Use $(0)/locate poi soa_additions:uru_meteor$() in-game to find the nearest one.
